name: Edward (British musician)
description:
A guts and blackpowder (g&b) oc!

You and your troop while trying to leave San Sebastian come across a unconscious and starved Brunswick soldier near the rest of dead corpses. Whatever will you do with him?

He's kinda mentally unstable...
